---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
date: today
---

A living record of wet lab experiments and protocols.
Not a computational notebook — that lives separately.
Every experiment entry is one `.qmd` file per run, committed to git when complete.

## Quick links

| Section | What's in it |
|---------|-------------|
| [Protocols](protocols/index.qmd) | Interactive calculators — set inputs, volumes update live, print to PDF |
| [Experiments](experiments/index.qmd) | One entry per experiment run, filed by date |

## How to use this notebook

**Printing a protocol:**

Open any protocol page, set your sample count and parameters — all volumes update
instantly in the browser. Hit **🖨 Print / Save as PDF** for a bench copy.

**Starting a new experiment:**

```bash
cp experiments/_templates/HiC_entry_template.qmd \
   experiments/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)_HiC-[target]-[celltype].qmd
```

Fill in each day's section at the bench. When the experiment is fully done:

```bash
git add experiments/YYYY-MM-DD_HiC-target-celltype.qmd
git commit -m "Hi-C [target] [celltype] — [one-line result summary]"
git push
```

**Rebuilding the site:**

```bash
quarto render && git add docs/ && git commit -m "rebuild" && git push
```

## Recent experiments

```{r}
#| output: asis
library(fs)
library(tidyverse)

entries <- dir_ls("experiments", glob = "*.qmd", recurse = FALSE) |>
  path_file() |>
  discard(~ str_starts(., "_") | str_starts(., "index"))

if (length(entries) == 0) {
  cat("_No experiment entries yet. Run your first experiment!_\n")
} else {
  entries |>
    sort(decreasing = TRUE) |>
    head(10) |>
    walk(~ cat(paste0("- [", path_ext_remove(.), "](experiments/", ., ")\n")))
}
```
